commands_run.command: uv run ruff check --select F,I src/tau_coding/handoff_dispatch.py src/tau_coding/project_dag.py src/tau_coding/cli.py tests/test_handoff_dispatch.py tests/test_project_dag.py
uv run pytest tests/test_handoff_dispatch.py tests/test_project_dag.py tests/test_evidence_manifest.py tests/test_generic_dag.py tests/test_generic_provider_adapter.py -q
git diff --check -- src/tau_coding/handoff_dispatch.py src/tau_coding/project_dag.py src/tau_coding/cli.py tests/test_handoff_dispatch.py tests/test_project_dag.py

proves: Tau command dispatch specs can be checked against tau.command_spec_policy.v1 before subprocess execution.
Allowed command roots, denied commands, and allowed cwd roots are enforced for command-loop dispatch.
Command-loop receipts include command_spec_path, command_spec_sha256, command_policy_path, and command_policy_sha256 when a policy is supplied.
Project DAG contracts can reference a command_policy artifact and pass it through both handoff-loop and bounded-ready-queue execution paths.
The tau handoff-command-loop CLI accepts --command-policy and records policy hashes in command results.
does_not_prove: Full P1 schema hardening beyond the command-spec trust boundary.
next_recommended_route: Continue P1 with Herdr workspace lease receipts, evidence validators expansion, or branch-lock side-effect authorization.
